## Source

## Required fields

- [ ] Date
- [ ] Entity identifier
- [ ] Value fields

## Validation checks

- [ ] Date range check
- [ ] Duplicate key check
- [ ] Missingness check
- [ ] Unit check
- [ ] Metadata written

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Ingestion script runs
- [ ] Output schema documented
- [ ] Tests added
- [ ] README or DATA_SOURCES updated
